headline: Intel Tenstorrent Talks Highlight AI Ambitions And Valuation Questions
summary: Intel (NasdaqGS:INTC) is reportedly in talks to acquire AI chip startup Tenstorrent. The potential deal would expand Intel's capabilities in dedicated AI hardware and talent. The news highlights Intel's focus on AI chips beyond its existing product roadmaps and earnings cycle. Intel shares most recently traded at $110.8, with the stock up 61.8% over the past 30 days and 181.4% year to date. Over the past year, the share price has gained 420.9%, and the 3 year and 5 year returns stand at...

headline: Intel Stock Surges Back to Winning Ways as Chips Rally Reignites
summary: Intel stock finally snapped its 5-day winning streak and it’s already back on the charge.  The shares were jumping 3.8% in premarket trading after closing 2.4% higher Tuesday to end its five-day losing run.  The stock fell 16% over that period and investors were perhaps starting to question whether it would be more than a blip.

content.title: Intel Stock Surges Back to Winning Ways as Chips Rally Reignites
